text:
A wise old owl knew all about success, fame, wealth... Except for one thing. He fancied a quiet life. Every day he woke up in his cosy tree nest, sipped a nice cup of owl-sized wine, and read old books.

One day, a shiny new feather dropped into his nest. Curious, the wise owl picked it up and ran his beak over it. It wasn't just any feather—it was a letter.

Dear Wise Owl,

You're just the person we want to talk about something important. We've been working on a new project—Iron Wings Artisanal Honey. We're passionate about making honey that smells just like wildflowers. We could make some that smells... like you.

Would you like to invest? Every spoonful could be a gift.

Best,
A Couple of Honey Lovers

Maybe he shouldn't get involved. After all, he'd only ever miss one nice, quiet day. But his bird friends urged him. The Honey
